MINORIS-MINORIS.title: Minoris
MINORIS-MINORIS.description: A boy blessed by the Sun God. Multi-hit attacks; hates bees.
MINORIS-MINORIS.aromaPrinciple: May the sun be with you
MINORIS-MINORIS.cardsModifierDescription: Minoris's cards now appear in rewards and shops.
MINORIS-MINORIS.unlockText: Play a run using [pink]{Prerequisite}[/pink] to unlock this character.
